mapper.sql: id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, is_deleted, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, user_id, parent_id, content, status, is_deleted, create_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET post_id = #{postId}, user_id = #{userId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post_comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE post_comment SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}

SELECT id FROM post_comment WHERE parent_id IN
#{id}
